afrika.notes: Keep the current path until the partition solver is validated on the same source assets.

asien.notes: Promoted after tiny-review. Lower tail is materially better than legacy, and both JPN and BRN now have viable automatic rescue paths.

europa.notes: Best canary region so far; mean and lower-tail IoU are strong enough to promote first.

nordamerika.notes: Promoted after region review. The lower tail improved materially over legacy, with broad gains across Central America and the large-country cases.

oceanien.notes: Promoted after the archipelago review. The new mask-lock rescue closes the island-chain failure mode while keeping the region-level partition mesh path.

vastindien.notes: Promoted after regional review. The archipelago rescue closes the Bahamas and Trinidad/Tobago failure modes while preserving the shared partition-mesh path.
